mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM relation WHERE rel_clsf = 10 AND trip_conts_id = #{tripContsId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM relation WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND rel_clsf = 10
SELECT user_no, trip_conts_id, rel_clsf, reg_dt FROM relation WHERE rel_clsf = 10 ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relation ( rel_no, rel_clsf, user_no, course_no ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(rel_no), 0) + 1 FROM relation), 10, #{userNo}, #{courseNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM relation WHERE rel_clsf = 10 AND course_no = #{courseNo}
